TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit ArmCertificateRegistrationModelFactory extends System.Object

Docs.summary: A factory class for creating instances of the models for mocking.

Docs.param: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}.
The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts".
Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.
The geo-location where the resource lives.
State of the Key Vault secret.
true if the certificate should be automatically renewed when it expires; otherwise, false.
Last CSR that was created for this order.
Current serial number of the certificate.
true if private key is external; otherwise, false.
Reasons why App Service Certificate is not renewable at the current moment.
Time stamp when the certificate would be auto renewed next.

Docs.param: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}.
The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts".
Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.
Indicates status of the most severe insight.
Additional configuration for different data providers to be used by the UI.
Suggested utterances where the detector can be applicable.

MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.ResourceManager.CertificateRegistration.Models.ArmCertificateRegistrationModelFactory.AppServiceDetectorInfo (id, name, description, author, category, supportTopicList, analysisType, type, score)

Docs.param: Short description of the detector and its purpose.
Problem category. This serves for organizing group for detectors.
List of Support Topics for which this detector is enabled.
Analysis Types for which this detector should apply to.
Whether this detector is an Analysis Detector or not.
Defines score of a detector to power ML based matching.

static member ReissueCertificateOrderContent : Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier * string * Azure.Core.ResourceType * Azure.ResourceManager.Models.SystemData * Nullable<int> * Nullable<int> * string * Nullable<bool> -> Azure.ResourceManager.CertificateRegistration.Models.ReissueCertificateOrderContent
MemberSignature.Usage: Azure.ResourceManager.CertificateRegistration.Models.ArmCertificateRegistrationModelFactory.ReissueCertificateOrderContent (id, name, resourceType, systemData, keySize, delayExistingRevokeInHours, csr, isPrivateKeyExternal)

Docs.param: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. Ex - /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}.
The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts".
Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.
Delay in hours to revoke existing certificate after the new certificate is issued.
Csr to be used for re-key operation.
Should we change the ASC type (from managed private key to external private key and vice versa).
